page: Microsoft Azure D64ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine belonging to the Ddsv7 server family. Powered by an x86_64 Intel processor, this instance features 64 dedicated virtual CPUs and 256.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. The virtual machine runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, ensuring secure virtualization and resource isolation.

A key hardware feature of the D64ds_v7 is its bundled local storage, which provides 3780 GB of local disk capacity. Additionally, the instance is Premium Storage capable, allowing integration with high-performance persistent disk options. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its high core count and substantial local storage capacity, the D64ds_v7 offers resource density suitable for enterprise-scale workloads. The balanced allocation of compute and memory resources, combined with large local storage, makes this server type appropriate for relational databases, large-scale web serving, application servers, and general-purpose enterprise applications requiring fast local scratch space.
description: Microsoft Azure D64ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine from the Ddsv7 family, built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor. Operating under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, it provides 64 dedicated vCPUs and 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 4.0 GB of memory per core. The instance features 3780 GB of bundled local storage and is Premium Storage capable, though it lacks GPU accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile delivers a balanced ratio of compute and memory alongside high-capacity local disk space. The D64ds_v7 is designed for resource-dense workloads, making it a suitable choice for database deployments, enterprise application hosting, and general-purpose business-critical tasks requiring substantial local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure D64ds_v7 is a general-purpose virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 256 GB of RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A balanced general-purpose virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores, high-capacity local storage, and premium storage compatibility.
bullet_points: 256.0 GB of system memory with a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
3780 GB of bundled local storage with Premium Storage capability
Virtualization powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor
Well-suited for databases, enterprise applications, and web serving
